data.title: Replace implementation-plan Behavioral Test Requirement section with shared standard reference
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
In plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md:

1. Replace the "#### Behavioral Test Requirement" section (lines ~630-651) with a reference to the shared behavioral testing standard at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
2. Reframe the test approach requirement to use Given/When/Then framing per the shared standard Rule 2
3. Keep planning-specific items in implementation-plan: Unit Test Exemption Criteria (3-criterion justification), Integration Test Task Rule (two exemption pathways), Test Filename Conventions (fuzzy-match algorithm)
4. Ensure no downstream parsers break from section heading removal

The old parallel rule set (acceptable RED test categories) is moved into the shared standard. Implementation-plan retains only workflow orchestration rules.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (modify — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)
- tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-standard-reference.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Implementation-plan SKILL.md no longer contains a standalone "Behavioral Test Requirement" section with inline rule definitions
  Verify: ! grep -A5 "#### Behavioral Test Requirement" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q "valid RED test must"
- [ ] Implementation-plan SKILL.md references the shared standard by path
  Verify: grep -q "behavioral-testing-standard.md" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Given/When/Then framing appears in test approach guidance
  Verify: grep -q "Given.*When.*Then\|Given/When/Then" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Unit Test Exemption Criteria section is preserved
  Verify: grep -q "Unit Test Exemption Criteria" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Integration Test Task Rule section is preserved
  Verify: grep -q "Integration Test Task Rule" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
